name: have-i-been-pwned
title: Have I Been Pwned
description: Check if your email or password has been exposed in a data breach
author: narghev

preferences.name: apiKey
preferences.title: HIBP API Key
preferences.description: Required for email breach lookups. Get one at haveibeenpwned.com/API/Key

preferences.name: paddingEnabled
preferences.title: Pwned Passwords
preferences.label: Request response padding
preferences.description: Adds the Add-Padding header to Pwned Passwords requests for extra privacy.

commands.name: breached-account
commands.title: Breached Account
commands.subtitle: Have I Been Pwned
commands.description: Check if an email address has appeared in a data breach

commands.name: pwned-password
commands.title: Pwned Password
commands.subtitle: Have I Been Pwned
commands.description: Check if a password has been exposed in a data breach (privacy-safe k-anonymity)

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
